calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-01-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Household Financial Corp. of California.
No appearance by the Defendant: David A. Clements.
Declaration of Plaintiff in lieu of personal testimony at trial (CCP 98) received & filed in court.
After hearing the testimony by counsel, considering of the evidence presented and declaration in support by Patricia Garcia, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $7,583.91
Interest $821.26
Costs $270.00, for a Total of $8,675.17
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT DAVID CLEMENTS Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment IS GRANTED. DEFAULT VACATED AND DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HIS ANSWER FORTHWITH. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/LB
